target: Fix parent TEMPLATE.md to include Cites: field — match genesis.sh parity
expect: TEMPLATE.md gains Cites: field. Genesis/parent template parity achieved. 71.3% of existing lessons already have Cites: via lesson_quality_fixer.py retroactive addition.
actual: TEMPLATE.md updated: added Cites: L-{NNN} on line 2 (between title and Date:). Now matches genesis.sh atom:lesson-template exactly. 811/1138 lessons (71.3%) already have Cites: headers. The 28.7% gap consists of older lessons pre-dating lesson_quality_fixer.py. New lessons using the template will include the field by default.
diff: Expected simple 1-line fix: CONFIRMED. Key insight: genesis.sh already had this fix (v7), but the parent TEMPLATE.md did not — so the parent was modeling lessons WITHOUT citations while telling children to USE citations. The parent's own practices were inconsistent with what it transmitted.
verdict: CONFIRMED — 1-line fix applied. Parent/genesis template parity achieved. The parent TEMPLATE.md now structurally promotes L-to-L citation for new lessons. Per L-601, this structural enforcement will sustain citation practice without voluntary compliance. Remaining 28.7% gap can be closed by lesson_quality_fixer.py batch runs.
successor: Measure child swarm L-to-L citation rate after next genesis spawn using updated template. Predict: >30% L-to-L rate in first 20 child lessons (vs 0% baseline from n=33 pre-fix children).
